articles.titleKo: 이라크 투자청장 해임 투표
articles.summaryKo:
이라크 국회가 투자청장을 해임하기로 투표했다.
청장은 불참 상태에서 질의응답을 받았다.
이 결정은 정치적 긴장을 더욱 고조시킬 것으로 예상된다.
향후 투자 정책에 미치는 영향이 주목된다.
투자청장은 국회에서의 질의응답에 불참했다.
해임 투표는 국회의원들 사이에서 논란을 일으켰다.
articles.description: مجلس النواب يصوت على اعفاء رئيس هيئة الاستثمار من منصبه بعد استجوابه غيابيا PUKmedia یەکێتیی نیشتمانیی کوردستان
detailsKo: 투자청장은 국회에서의 질의응답에 불참했다.
해임 투표는 국회의원들 사이에서 논란을 일으켰다.
정치적 불안정성이 투자 환경에 미칠 영향이 우려된다.
국회는 향후 투자 정책에 대한 재검토를 예고했다.
articles.reportBullet: 이라크 국회가 투자청장 해임을 결정함으로써 정치적 불안정성이 심화될 가능성이 있다.
reportSubBullets: 청장의 불참은 국회 내에서의 신뢰 문제를 드러낸다.
정치적 긴장이 투자 유치에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다.
향후 정책 변화가 예상되며, 투자자들의 우려가 커질 것이다.
articles.reportImplication: 정치적 불안정성이 지속될 경우 이라크의 경제 성장에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다.

이라크 투자청 의장이 해임된 후 의회 감시 역할을 존중한다고 밝혔다.
투자청은 의회에 대한 두 가지 질문 연기 요청을 제출했다.
이 사건은 정치적 긴장을 더욱 고조시키고 있다.
향후 투자 정책에 미치는 영향이 우려된다.
투자청 의장 해임은 정치적 갈등의 일환으로 발생했다.
의회는 정부의 투명성과 책임성을 높이기 위해 감시 역할을 강화하고 있다.

부패 방지 위원회는 해당 청장의 부패 혐의를 조사할 예정이다.

articles.titleKo: 이라크 의회, 국가투자위원회 의장 해임 및 부패 조사 결정
articles.summaryKo:
이라크 의회가 국가투자위원회(NIC) 의장을 해임하고 관련 파일을 부패 방지 위원회에 이관하기로 결정하였다.
이 조치는 이라크의 투자 환경에 중대한 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상된다.
NIC 의장 해임은 이라크 정부의 부패 척결 의지를 반영.
부패 방지 위원회에 이관된 파일은 향후 조사 및 처벌의 기초가 될 가능성.
투자 환경의 신뢰성 회복 필요성 대두.
NIC 의장 해임은 부패 척결을 위한 조치로 해석.

부패 조사로 인해 이라크의 건설 프로젝트에 대한 신뢰도 저하 가능성.

articles.title: IMF expects severe contraction in Iraq's economy in 2026 - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: IMF, 이라크 경제 2026년 심각한 축소 예상
articles.summaryKo:
국제통화기금(IMF)은 2026년 이라크 경제가 중동 및 중앙아시아의 석유 및 운송 중단으로 가장 큰 타격을 받을 것이라고 전망했다.
그러나 2027년에는 에너지 시장 상황이 개선되면서 경제가 회복될 것으로 예상된다.
2026년 중동 및 중앙아시아 국가들의 성장률이 0.7%로 급락할 것으로 예상됨.
이라크, 쿠웨이트, 카타르 등 에너지 수출에 의존하는 국가들이 큰 영향을 받을 것으로 보임.
2027년에는 10% 이상의 성장률 회복이 예상됨.
에너지 생산 및 운송 중단이 주요 원인으로 작용할 가능성.
articles.description: The IMF projected on Thursday that Iraq's economy will be the most hit by oil and transportation disruptions in the Middle East in 2026. The International Monetary Fund. Photo: AP Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) – The International Monetary Fund (IMF) projected on Thursday that Iraq’s economy will be the most hit by oil and transportation disruptions in the Middle East and Central Asia in 2026. The IMF also predicted a robust economic rebound in 2027, when energy market conditions improve and commerce resume, local news outlet Shafaq News reported. In its recent World Economic Outlook report, the IMF projected that Middle Eastern and Central Asian countries will see a sharp drop in growth to 0.7 percent in 2026, before rebounding to 6.5 percent in 2027. These forecasts assume that energy interruptions will last longer than previously predicted. The economies of Iraq, Kuwait, and Qatar, which are heavily reliant on commodities, will experience significant impacts from disruptions in energy production and transportation. These nations are expected to face an economic downturn in 2026, followed by growth rates exceeding ten percent in 2027. The anticipated fall in 2026 will mainly result from the disruption in oil production and distribution, especially by those nations that depend heavily on energy exports, but the recovery in 2027 will be brought about by a reduction of these shocks and resumption of business activities. The IMF’s latest prediction reduces the region’s growth forecast for 2026 by 1.2 percent from the April report, while the 2027 forecast is lifted by about 1.9 percent, suggesting expectations of a stronger rebound. The IMF, on the other hand, expects Saudi Arabia to remain largely unaffected due to its more diverse export channels, with an economic growth of 1.7 percent in 2026 and 5.5 percent in 2027.

articles.titleKo: 국제통화기금, 이라크 경제의 급격한 위축 예고
articles.summaryKo:
국제통화기금(IMF)은 이라크가 2026년에 에너지 및 운송의 혼란으로 인해 경제가 급격히 위축될 것이라고 전망했다.
그러나 2027년에는 에너지 상황 개선과 무역 회복으로 강한 경제 반등이 예상된다.
2026년 중동 및 중앙아시아 경제 성장률이 0.7%로 둔화될 것으로 예상됨.
이라크, 쿠웨이트, 카타르 등 원자재 생산국들이 2026년에 급격한 경제 위축을 겪을 것으로 보임.
2027년에는 생산 및 수출이 개선되면서 10% 이상의 성장률을 기록할 것으로 전망됨.
2026년 경제 둔화는 에너지 생산 및 운송의 혼란에 기인.
articles.description: شفق نيوز- متابعة توقع صندوق النقد &#1 توقع صندوق النقد الدولي، يوم الخميس، أن يكون الاقتصاد العراقي الأكثر تأثراً باضطرابات الطاقة والنقل في منطقة الشرق الأوسط وآسيا الوسطى خلال عام 2026، لكنه رجح تسجيل انتعاش اقتصادي "قوي" خلال عام 2027 مع تحسن أوضاع الطاقة وعودة حركة التجارة. وقال الصندوق في تحديث تقرير آفاق الاقتصاد العالمي لشهر تموز/ يوليو 2026، إن اقتصادات الشرق الأوسط وآسيا الوسطى ستشهد تباطؤاً حاداً في النمو إلى 0.7% خلال عام 2026، قبل أن تحقق قفزة إلى 6.5% في عام 2027، وهذه التوقعات تعكس استمرار اضطرابات الطاقة لفترة أطول من المتوقع سابقاً. وأشار إلى أن العراق والكويت وقطر، باعتبارها دولاً منتجة للسلع الأولية والأكثر تأثراً باضطرابات إنتاج الطاقة ونقلها، من المتوقع أن تشهد انكماشاً حاداً في اقتصاداتها خلال عام 2026، قبل أن تسجل نمواً بمعدلات تتجاوز 10% خلال عام 2027 مع عودة الإنتاج والصادرات إلى مستويات أفضل. وبيّن صندوق النقد أن التراجع المتوقع في 2026 يرتبط بشكل أساسي بتأثيرات اضطرابات إنتاج النفط والنقل، ولاسيما بالنسبة للدول التي تعتمد بشكل كبير على صادرات الطاقة، في حين سيكون التعافي في 2027 مدفوعاً بانحسار الصدمات وعودة النشاط الاقتصادي. وأوضح أن توقعاته الجديدة تمثل خفضاً لنمو المنطقة في عام 2026 بمقدار 1.2 نقطة مئوية مقارنة بتقرير نيسان/ أبريل الماضي، مقابل رفع توقعات عام 2027 بنحو 1.9 نقطة مئوية، نتيجة توقعات بانتعاش أكبر بعد انتهاء الاضطرابات. وفي المقابل، توقع الصندوق أن تكون السعودية أقل تأثراً نسبياً بسبب امتلاكها طرق تصدير أكثر تنوعاً، مع توقع نمو اقتصادها بنسبة 1.7% في 2026 وارتفاعه إلى 5.5% في 2027. وأكد صندوق النقد أن تأثيرات الأزمة الحالية تختلف بين الدول بحسب اعتمادها على صادرات الطاقة، وقدرتها على تنويع طرق التجارة، وحجم احتياطياتها، مشيراً إلى أن الدول المنتجة للنفط قد تتعرض لصدمات قوية على المدى القصير، لكنها تمتلك فرص تعافٍ أسرع مع استقرار أسواق الطاقة.

articles.title: Iraq to continue to ask OPEC for fair production quota - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크, OPEC에 공정한 생산 할당 요청 지속
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 총리 알리 알자이디는 자국의 능력에 기반한 공정한 생산 할당을 OPEC에 지속적으로 요청할 것이라고 밝혔다. 이란과의 전쟁으로 인해 이라크의 석유 수출과 수익이 심각하게 저해되고 있으며, OPEC의 제약이 실제 생산 능력을 반영하지 않는다고 강조하였다.
articles.description: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi stated that his country will continue to ask OPEC for a fair production quota based on its capabilities. The logo of OPEC. Photo: AFP Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) – Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi stated that his country will continue to ask OPEC for a fair production quota based on its capabilities and potential. In an interview with Al Arabiya, al-Zaidi explained that the Iraqi government is not considering withdrawal from OPEC. Last month, Reuters reported that Iraq, OPEC’s second-largest producer following Saudi Arabia and one of its founding members, was considering quitting if the organization did not enable Baghdad to dramatically expand oil output. Local news outlets mentioned that Iraq is considering a proposal to boost its oil exports against OPEC’s restrictions to compensate for the wartime shortfall. According to sources, Iraq is analyzing the implications of surpassing OPEC’s oil production ceiling because of the crude surplus and its impact on market prices. This decision is motivated by a serious internal financial crisis caused by the regional war involving Iran, which has severely hampered the country’s oil exports and income. Because of the prolonged war against Iran, Iraq has seen its exporting ability drastically cut back and hence requires a higher quota to keep its economy going. Iraq has repeatedly stated that the constraints set by OPEC do not truly reflect its actual production capabilities and revenue requirements.

articles.description: السومرية نيوز – سياسة صوّت مجلس النواب، اليوم الخميس، على إعفاء رئيس الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار، حيدر مكية، من منصبه، وذلك في خطوة تأتي عقب جلسات استجواب غيابية شهدت طرح ملفات تتعلق بخروقات إدارية وقانونية داخل الهيئة. البرلمان يُصوت على إعفاء رئيس الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار من منصبه وإحالة الملفات إلى النزاهة السومرية نيوز – سياسة صوّت مجلس النواب ، اليوم الخميس، على إعفاء رئيس الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار ، حيدر مكية ، من منصبه، وذلك في خطوة تأتي عقب جلسات استجواب غيابية شهدت طرح ملفات تتعلق بخروقات إدارية وقانونية داخل الهيئة. البرلمان يُصوت على إعفاء رئيس الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار من منصبه وإحالة الملفات إلى النزاهة الدائرة الإعلامية لمجلس النواب الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار هيئة النزاهة الاتحادية

articles.title: السومرية تنشر ملفات الاستجواب والأسئلة الموجهة لرئيس هيئة الاستثمار (وثائق)
articles.titleKo: 이라크 의회, 투자위원장 심문 진행
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 의회가 국가투자위원회 위원장에 대한 심문을 진행하고 있으며, 이는 투자 부문에서의 행정 및 재정적 위반 사항을 조사하기 위한 조치로 해석된다. 관련 질문 목록이 공개되며, 의회의 감시 기능이 강화되고 있다.
articles.description: السومرية نيوز – سياسة في إطار متابعتها لتطورات جلسة مجلس النواب اليوم الخميس، حصلت السومرية نيوز على تفاصيل الملفات والأسئلة الرقابية التي أعدتها اللجان النيابية المختصة لاستجواب رئيس الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار، وذلك ضمن مسعى البرلمان لفتح ملفات الخروقات الإدارية والمالية في قطاع الاستثمار. السومرية تنشر ملفات الاستجواب والأسئلة الموجهة لرئيس هيئة الاستثمار (وثائق) السومرية نيوز – سياسة في إطار متابعتها لتطورات جلسة مجلس النواب اليوم الخميس، حصلت " السومرية نيوز" على تفاصيل الملفات والأسئلة الرقابية التي أعدتها اللجان النيابية المختصة لاستجواب رئيس الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار ، وذلك ضمن مسعى البرلمان لفتح ملفات "الخروقات الإدارية والمالية" في قطاع الاستثمار. الاستجواب والأسئلة الموجهة لرئيس هيئة الاستثمار (وثائق) الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار

articles.title: Iraq sign deal with HKN Energy to develop Hamrin field - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크, HKN 에너지와 하므린 유전 개발 계약 체결
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 국영 북부 석유 회사(NOC)가 미국 HKN 에너지와 하므린 유전 개발 계약을 체결하였다. 이 계약은 이라크 정부의 석유 및 가스 생산 증대를 목표로 하며, 하루 14만 배럴의 석유와 4000만 입방피트의 가스를 생산할 예정이다.
articles.description: Iraqi state-owned North Oil Company (NOC) signed a deal on Thursday with US-based HKN Energy to develop the Hamrin field in northern Iraq. Representatives of Iraq’s NOC and US-based HKN Energy during a ceremony held under the auspices of Oil Minister Basim Khudair to sign a deal to develop the Hamrin field. Photo: Iraqi Oil Ministry Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) – Iraqi state-owned North Oil Company (NOC) signed a deal on Thursday with US-based HKN Energy to develop the Hamrin field in northern Iraq. The step is part of the Iraqi Ministry of Oil’s goal to effectively utilize resources and boost oil and gas output. During a ceremony held to sign the deal, Oil Minister Basim Khudair confirmed that the step is consistent with the government’s strategy to provide sufficient oil and gas supplies for local consumption while boosting export rates. Under the deal, the field’s oil production will reach 140,000 barrels per day in addition to 40 million cubic feet per day of gas, according to Khudair. To minimize gas flaring, the generated gas will be utilized to generate electricity within the field and in operations to boost output, according to the oil minister. Despite economic and security issues, the Hamrin oil field currently has a production capability that ranges between 20,000 and 25,000 barrels per day. The agreement is also part of Baghdad’s aspirations to boost oil output to around seven million barrels per day over the coming few years.

During a ceremony held to sign the deal, Oil Minister Basim Khudair confirmed that the step is consistent with the government’s strategy to provide sufficient oil and gas supplies for local consumption while boosting export rates. Under the deal, the field’s oil production will reach 140,000 barrels per day in addition to 40 million cubic feet per day of gas, according to Khudair. To minimize gas flaring, the generated gas will be utilized to generate electricity within the field and in operations to boost output, according to the oil minister. Despite economic and security issues, the Hamrin oil field currently has a production capability that ranges between 20,000 and 25,000 barrels per day. The agreement is also part of Baghdad’s aspirations to boost oil output to around seven million barrels per day over the coming few years.

articles.title: Iraq, Kuwait discuss security cooperation - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크와 쿠웨이트, 안보 협력 논의
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 외무장관 후아드 후세인과 쿠웨이트 내무장관 셰이크 파하드 알사바흐가 양국 간의 안보 협력을 논의하였다. 이들은 중동의 긴장이 고조되는 가운데 경제 협력과 지역 발전에 대한 접근 방안을 모색하였다.
articles.description: The Iraqi foreign minister and the Kuwaiti interior minister discussed on Wednesday security cooperation between the two countries. Iraqi Foreign Minister Fuad Hussein and Kuwaiti Foreign Minister Sheikh Jarrah Jaber. Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) – Iraqi Foreign Minister Fuad Hussein and Kuwait’s First Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Interior, Sheikh Fahad al-Sabah, discussed on Wednesday security cooperation between the two countries. Upon his arrival, Hussein was welcomed by his Kuwaiti counterpart, Foreign Minister Sheikh Jarrah Jaber al-Ahmad al-Sabah. The two foreign ministers discussed approaches to strengthen bilateral ties, enhance economic cooperation, and address regional developments amid growing tensions in the Middle East. The officials discussed approaches to enhance collaboration in several areas, as well as preparations for the next Iraqi-Kuwaiti Joint Committee meetings in Baghdad. The discussions addressed strategies to handle escalating tensions, particularly US-Iran talks and recent security incidents in the Arabian Gulf. Additionally, Kuwaiti Crown Prince Sheikh Sabah Khaled al-Hamad al-Sabah and Prime Minister Sheikh Ahmad Abdullah al-Ahmad al-Sabah welcomed Hussein and his accompanying delegation to reaffirm mutual diplomatic commitments. Hussein stated that his visit to the neighboring country seeks to communicate the Iraqi government’s viewpoint on the security challenges confronting Iraq and the broader region. He also highlighted the implications of these challenges for Iraq’s relationships with regional countries, especially Kuwait. The Iraqi foreign minister examined the security issues resulting from the recent conflict and their impacts on Iraqi and regional security, according to the Iraqi Foreign Ministry. Hussein emphasized that the Iraqi government, led by Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi, has a clear strategy for resolving domestic and external security concerns while boosting collaboration with neighboring nations to promote regional stability. The discussions focused on recent incidents involving Iraqi fishermen in the shared waters between the two countries, which tragically resulted in the death of one Iraqi fisherman. Hussein emphasized the importance of establishing cooperative mechanisms and preventive measures that reflect the will of both countries’ leadership to safeguard their citizens and protect their relations. Both parties emphasized the importance of finding common ground on security issues and enhancing collaboration among key institutions. They also stressed the need to prevent any accidental incidents or breaches that could jeopardize bilateral relations. The two sides underlined the significance of continuing collaborative investigations into the security breaches identified by Kuwaiti authorities.

articles.title: Iraq tightens Iran dollar controls as US restarts shipments - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크, 이란 달러 통제 강화 및 미국 화폐 공급 재개
articles.summaryKo: 미국이 이란과 이란 지지 무장 단체에 대한 자금 유입을 차단하기 위해 이라크의 금융 시스템을 강화하기로 합의하면서 달러 공급이 재개되었다. 이란 전쟁 발발 이후 4개월간 중단되었던 달러 화폐 공급이 다시 시작되었으며, 이라크는 자금 흐름 모니터링을 강화할 예정이다.
articles.description: Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) — The United States has restarted supplies of U.S. dollar banknotes to Iraq after Baghdad agreed to take further steps to stop American cash from reaching Iran and […] Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) — The United States has restarted supplies of U.S. dollar banknotes to Iraq after Baghdad agreed to take further steps to stop American cash from reaching Iran and Iran-backed armed organizations, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing Iraqi and United States officials. The outbreak of the Iran war in late February froze shipments of physical dollars from Iraq’s oil revenues held at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, enforced by the U.S. Treasury Department, and shipments were suspended for some four months, putting pressure on Baghdad’s cash-based economy. Under the deal, Iraq promised to tighten its financial system, including stricter regulation of currency exchange firms and efforts to prevent U.S. cash from reaching Iran or Iran-backed militias via salaries and other financial channels. Iraq agreed to put in place extra protections to prevent armed organizations from abusing its banking system, a U.S. Treasury official told the newspaper, and shipments resumed. Iraqi authorities said dollar payments had resumed but did not disclose the new terms publicly. During the delay, the Treasury Department canceled at least two cash shipments, including one for around $500 million, before delivery resumed late last month, The Wall Street Journal said. The deal comes as Prime Minister Ali Falih Al-Zaidi aims to boost economic ties with Washington while pushing domestic banking reforms. Al-Zaidi is set to go to the United States later this month to have meetings with President Donald Trump, the newspaper added. The report also mentioned that the Trump administration has pushed Baghdad to limit the role of Iran-backed militias, including steps to tighten monitoring of cash flows and increase official control over armed organizations. Analysts told The Wall Street Journal that there are big political obstacles to enacting such regulations, given the entrenched role of militia groups in Iraq’s political and security scene. Since 2003, Iraq has depended on supplies of U.S. dollar banknotes since most of its economy is still cash-based. Access to actual dollars is a key source of liquidity for Iraq’s banking sector since oil profits are kept at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York before being released to Iraq. The new deal is part of a wider push by Washington to tighten financial controls in Iraq while reducing the ability to evade sanctions and move dollars illegally across borders, as Baghdad grapples with balancing its strong economic links with the United States and neighboring Iran.

articles.title: Iran to bury Khamenei in hometown as US ramps up strikes - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크, 카메네이 장례식과 미국의 공습 증가
articles.summaryKo: 이란의 고위 지도자 카메네이의 장례식이 이란 마슈하드에서 진행되며, 미국의 공습이 중동 전쟁의 새로운 격화를 초래할 가능성이 커지고 있다. 장례식은 이란과 이라크의 여러 도시에서 수백만 명의 조문객이 참석한 가운데 진행되었다.
articles.description: Iranians were preparing on Thursday to bury their slain leader Ali Khamenei in his hometown of Mashhad in northeast Iran, as new US strikes threatened to trigger a fresh... Iranians wait at a bus stop as they sit under a banner featuring Iran’s late supreme leaders Ayatollah Ali Khamenei (L) and his son newly elected supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei, in northern Tehran Mashhad – Iranians were preparing on Thursday to bury their slain leader Ali Khamenei in his hometown of Mashhad in northeast Iran, as new US strikes threatened to trigger a fresh escalation in the Middle East war. The late supreme leader’s burial follows a multi-day funeral ceremony that attracted millions of mourners across various cities in both Iran and Iraq. But just as the funeral rites headed into their final day, the United States launched new strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on shipping in the vital Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump, who had earlier said the US ceasefire with Iran was over, warned of “much worse” to come if Iran continues to strike vessels in the strait. Khamenei was killed on February 28, the first day of the US-Israeli strikes that started the war. Following a marathon procession through the holy cities of Najaf and Karbala in neighbouring Iraq on Wednesday, he was to reach his final place of rest in the holy city of Mashhad. Observers have been watching closely for any signs of Khamenei’s son and successor Mojtaba Khamenei, who has yet to make any public appearances and was said to have been injured in the same strike that killed his father. Mashhad governor Hassan Hosseini was quoted on state television as saying he “expects 15 million people” to attend Khamenei’s funeral. The funeral was originally set to begin on Thursday at 6:00 am (0230 GMT), but local media later cited organisers as saying it would begin at 2:00 pm because ceremonies in Iraq had run late. According to the official IRNA news agency, Khamenei is to be buried Thursday evening in the Shrine of Imam Reza — Iran’s most revered place of worship. Imam Reza is the only one of the 12 Shia imams buried in Iran. Khamenei’s funeral ceremonies included a series of locations that reflect the religious, political and ideological pillars of the Islamic republic. His chief of staff, Mohammad Mohammadi-Golpaygani, had previously said on state television that Khamenei himself had wished to be buried in Mashhad. Several notable figures have been buried in the shrine over the centuries, including several former Iranian shahs, as well as former president Ebrahim Raisi. The ceremony has so far drawn massive crowds of people across various cities, starting with Khamenei’s three days of laying in state in the capital Tehran. The Islamic republic hopes the ceremony will project strength and unity following the Middle East war, and six months after a crackdown on anti-government protests. The ceremony has so far drawn massive crowds of people across various cities, starting with Khamenei’s three days of laying in state in the capital Tehran. The Islamic republic hopes the ceremony will project strength and unity following the Middle East war, and six months after a crackdown on anti-government protests. Khamenei, who had ruled Iran since 1989, was killed aged 86 along with several members of his family and top officials in an Israeli strike. After five weeks of intense hostilities, a fragile ceasefire and an initial accord with the US sought to put the Middle East conflict on hold. But the ceasefire looked increasingly threatened as US Central Command said it had carried out strikes to degrade the ability of Iranian forces “to threaten freedom of navigation” in the Strait of Hormuz — a key bone of contention in US-Iran talks. Calls for restraint abounded as US forces struck multiple sites on Iran’s coast in response to Iranian attacks on three ships in the waterway. Tehran earlier said it had struck US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait. Following ceremonies in Tehran, Khamenei’s remains were transported on Tuesday to the clerical city of Qom, then Wednesday to neighbouring Iraq, before his burial on Thursday. He will be buried with his infant granddaughter, son-in-law, daughter and Mojtaba Khamenei’s wife Zahra Haddad Adel, who were all killed in the February 28 strikes.
articles.fullText: Iranians wait at a bus stop as they sit under a banner featuring Iran’s late supreme leaders Ayatollah Ali Khamenei (L) and his son newly elected supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei, in northern Tehran Mashhad – Iranians were preparing on Thursday to bury their slain leader Ali Khamenei in his hometown of Mashhad in northeast Iran, as new US strikes threatened to trigger a fresh escalation in the Middle East war. The late supreme leader’s burial follows a multi-day funeral ceremony that attracted millions of mourners across various cities in both Iran and Iraq. But just as the funeral rites headed into their final day, the United States launched new strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on shipping in the vital Strait of Hormuz. President Donald Trump, who had earlier said the US ceasefire with Iran was over, warned of “much worse” to come if Iran continues to strike vessels in the strait. Khamenei was killed on February 28, the first day of the US-Israeli strikes that started the war. Following a marathon procession through the holy cities of Najaf and Karbala in neighbouring Iraq on Wednesday, he was to reach his final place of rest in the holy city of Mashhad. Observers have been watching closely for any signs of Khamenei’s son and successor Mojtaba Khamenei, who has yet to make any public appearances and was said to have been injured in the same strike that killed his father. Mashhad governor Hassan Hosseini was quoted on state television as saying he “expects 15 million people” to attend Khamenei’s funeral. The funeral was originally set to begin on Thursday at 6:00 am (0230 GMT), but local media later cited organisers as saying it would begin at 2:00 pm because ceremonies in Iraq had run late. According to the official IRNA news agency, Khamenei is to be buried Thursday evening in the Shrine of Imam Reza — Iran’s most revered place of worship. Imam Reza is the only one of the 12 Shia imams buried in Iran. Khamenei’s funeral ceremonies included a series of locations that reflect the religious, political and ideological pillars of the Islamic republic. His chief of staff, Mohammad Mohammadi-Golpaygani, had previously said on state television that Khamenei himself had wished to be buried in Mashhad. Several notable figures have been buried in the shrine over the centuries, including several former Iranian shahs, as well as former president Ebrahim Raisi. Tehran earlier said it had struck US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait. Following ceremonies in Tehran, Khamenei’s remains were transported on Tuesday to the clerical city of Qom, then Wednesday to neighbouring Iraq, before his burial on Thursday. He will be buried with his infant granddaughter, son-in-law, daughter and Mojtaba Khamenei’s wife Zahra Haddad Adel, who were all killed in the February 28 strikes.

articles.title: Anbar border revenue hits 109 billion dinars during June - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 안바르 주, 6월 국경 수익 1,090억 디나르 기록
articles.summaryKo: 안바르 주 정부는 6월 동안 4개 주요 국경 통과 지점에서 발생한 누적 재정 수익이 1,090억 이라크 디나르에 달했다고 발표하였다. 이는 지역 시장과 아라비아 만 국가를 직접 연결하는 국제 육상 운송 시스템 덕분에 이루어진 경제적 호황의 결과이다.
articles.description: Anbar's local government confirmed its four border crossings generated 109 billion IQD in June alone, boosted by unprecedented international overland transit to the Gulf. Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) – The local government of Anbar Province announced on Wednesday, July 8, 2026, that the cumulative financial revenues generated across its four primary border crossings reached an impressive 109 billion Iraqi dinars during the month of June. According to an official statement released by the authorized spokesperson for the Anbar government, Muaid Al-Dulaimi, and received by the Iraqi News Agency, this unprecedented surge in customs collections is the direct result of a massive, record-breaking wave of cross-border commercial trade. This economic boom was significantly driven by international overland transit transport systems connecting regional markets directly to the Arabian Gulf states. In response to this substantial commercial momentum, the Governor of Anbar, Omar Mishaan Dabbous, issued immediate executive directives to all relevant border personnel, ordering them to provide maximum logistical facilities and streamline clearance operations for all inbound and outbound commercial cargo trucks. Governor Dabbous emphasized the necessity of optimizing these trade lanes despite a total absence of dedicated federal financial allocations from the central government in Baghdad, relying instead on local administrative efficiencies to absorb the heavy traffic. This latest financial milestone significantly bolsters the province’s fiscal tracking record, bringing the combined customs revenue for the consecutive months of May and June to a staggering total of 200 billion Iraqi dinars. Financial analysts attribute this steady upward trajectory to Anbar’s strategic geographical positioning as Iraq’s vital western overland gateway, which has increasingly absorbed shifted shipping volumes as regional maritime chokepoints face ongoing security disruptions. Consequently, the local administration seeks to leverage these rising transit yields to fund localized public service projects and maintain critical transport infrastructure independently of central budgetary delays.

articles.description: وجَّهَ النائب الأول لرئيسِ مجلسِ النوابِ، عدنان فيحان الدليمي، اليوم الخميس، باستضافةِ هيئةِ استثمارِ البصرة، وإعدادِ جدولٍ لاستضافةِ الهيئاتِ الاستثماريةِ في جميعِ المحافظات. فيحان يوجِّه باستضافة هيئة استثمارِ البصرة والهيئات الاستثمارية في المحافظات وجَّهَ النائب الأول لرئيسِ مجلسِ النوابِ، عدنان فيحان الدليمي ، اليوم الخميس، باستضافةِ هيئةِ استثمارِ البصرة ، وإعدادِ جدولٍ لاستضافةِ الهيئاتِ الاستثماريةِ في جميعِ المحافظات. الهيئة الوطنية للاستثمار المكتب الإعلامي للنائب

articles.title: Iraq appoints first woman as deputy governor of Central Bank of Iraq - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이라크 중앙은행, 첫 여성 부총재 임명
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 중앙은행(CBI)에 샤이마 압바스 후와이르프가 부총재로 임명되었다. 이는 이라크 역사상 처음으로 여성 부총재가 탄생한 것으로, 경제 및 재정 거버넌스의 다양성을 증진하는 중요한 조치로 평가된다.
articles.description: Shaimaa Abbas Huwairf has been appointed Deputy Governor of the CBI, making her the bank’s first woman in history to hold this position. The Central Bank of Iraq. Photo: INA Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) – Former Director General of Iraq’s Federal Board of Supreme Audit Shaimaa Abbas Huwairf has been appointed as the Deputy Governor of the Central Bank of Iraq (CBI), making her the bank’s first woman in history to hold this position. Her selection represents an important step for diversity in Iraq’s main economic and financial governance institution. Huwairf’s previous expertise brings thorough budgetary monitoring and auditing experience to her current post. The newly appointed CBI deputy governor joins the executive leadership team alongside Nizar Nasser Hussein, the recently appointed CBI governor, at a time of increased fiscal responsibility oversight, auditing transparency, and banking industry improvements. Given her extensive experience in advanced financial inspections, her managerial position is likely to prioritize enhancing institutional oversight mechanisms and transparency methods in commercial banking institutions. Huwairf is also expected to contribute to national budgetary policies that would strengthen the value of the national currency and improve central financial operations.

articles.description: السومرية نيوز – أمن أفادت وكالة رويترز للأنباء، نقلاً عن مصادر أمنية عراقية، اليوم الخميس، بأن هجوماً بطائرة مسيّرة استهدف معسكراً يتبع لجماعة معارضة كردية إيرانية، في منطقة تقع شمال شرق مدينة أربيل بإقليم كردستان العراق. هجوم بطائرة مسيّرة يستهدف معسكراً للمعارضة الكردية الإيرانية شمال شرق أربيل السومرية نيوز – أمن أفادت وكالة "رويترز" للأنباء، نقلاً عن مصادر أمنية عراقية، اليوم الخميس، بأن هجوماً بطائرة مسيّرة استهدف معسكراً يتبع لجماعة معارضة كردية إيرانية، في منطقة تقع شمال شرق مدينة أربيل بإقليم كردستان العراق . هجوم بطائرة مسيّرة يستهدف معسكراً للمعارضة الكردية الإيرانية شمال شرق أربيل

articles.title: Khamenei's body leaves Iraq - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 이란 최고 지도자 카메네이, 이라크에서 장례식 후 귀국
articles.summaryKo: 이란의 최고 지도자 알리 카메네이의 유해가 이라크에서 장례식을 마친 후 이란 마슈하드로 이송되었다. 이 장례식에는 이라크와 이란의 고위 정치 및 종교 인사들이 참석하였다.
articles.description: Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) — The coffin of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei arrived Wednesday in the northeastern Iranian city of Mashhad ahead of burial at the Imam Reza Shrine following […] Iran’s supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed at the start of the war Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) — The coffin of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei arrived Wednesday in the northeastern Iranian city of Mashhad ahead of burial at the Imam Reza Shrine following funeral services in the Iraqi holy towns of Najaf and Karbala. The arrival in Mashhad marks the culmination of the funeral procession for Khamenei after days of ceremonies in Iran and Iraq with the participation of top political and religious dignitaries. Earlier this week, Khamenei’s remains were flown to Iraq, where Iraqi authorities held rites in the two holiest towns in Shia Islam, Najaf and Karbala. Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Falih Al-Zaidi and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian attended the Najaf celebrations. Following the procession in Iraq, the casket was taken to Iran to be buried at Mashhad, Khamenei’s hometown and the shrine of Imam Reza.
articles.cleanText: Iran’s supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed at the start of the war Baghdad (IraqiNews.com) — The coffin of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei arrived Wednesday in the northeastern Iranian city of Mashhad ahead of burial at the Imam Reza Shrine following funeral services in the Iraqi holy towns of Najaf and Karbala. The arrival in Mashhad marks the culmination of the funeral procession for Khamenei after days of ceremonies in Iran and Iraq with the participation of top political and religious dignitaries. Earlier this week, Khamenei’s remains were flown to Iraq, where Iraqi authorities held rites in the two holiest towns in Shia Islam, Najaf and Karbala. Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Falih Al-Zaidi and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian attended the Najaf celebrations. Following the procession in Iraq, the casket was taken to Iran to be buried at Mashhad, Khamenei’s hometown and the shrine of Imam Reza.

The arrival in Mashhad marks the culmination of the funeral procession for Khamenei after days of ceremonies in Iran and Iraq with the participation of top political and religious dignitaries. Earlier this week, Khamenei’s remains were flown to Iraq, where Iraqi authorities held rites in the two holiest towns in Shia Islam, Najaf and Karbala. Following the procession in Iraq, the casket was taken to Iran to be buried at Mashhad, Khamenei’s hometown and the shrine of Imam Reza.

articles.title: الاطار التنسيقي يوجه رسالة للعراقيين بعد بشأن تشييع السيد خامنئي
articles.titleKo: 이라크, 알리 하메네이 추모식에 대한 메시지 발표
articles.summaryKo: 이라크의 정치 세력인 이라크 조정 프레임워크가 알리 하메네이의 추모식에 대한 메시지를 발표하였다. 이들은 이라크 국민의 참여와 헌신을 높이 평가하며, 국가의 단합과 가치에 대한 중요성을 강조하였다.
articles.description: miliq.news الاطار التنسيقي يوجه رسالة للعراقيين بعد بشأن تشييع السيد خامنئي الاطار التنسيقي يوجه رسالة للعراقيين بعد بشأن تشييع السيد خامنئي بغداد- ميل ثمّن الإطار التنسيقي، اليوم الخميس، المشاركة الواسعة للعراقيين في مراسم تشييع نعش السيد علي الخامنئي. وقال الإطار التنسيقي في بيان صادر عن دائرته الإعلامية، إن "العراقيين أثبتوا مرة أخرى أنهم أهل الوفاء والكرامة، وأنهم شعب لا ينسى من وقف معه وساند قضاياه، إذ جسّدوا بمشاركتهم الواسعة ومشاعرهم الصادقة أسمى معاني الوفاء في تشييع النعش الطاهر لشهيد الأمة آية الله العظمى السيد الشهيد علي الخامنئي (رضوان الله تعالى عليه) والشهداء من أهل بيته". وأضاف البيان أن "الحضور المهيب والمشاعر الصادقة التي عبّر عنها المشاركون تعكس أصالة العراقيين وتمسكهم بقيمهم الدينية والوطنية والأخلاقية، وتجسد عمق الوفاء لمن قدّم التضحيات في سبيل قضايا الأمة". وأعرب الإطار التنسيقي عن خالص شكره وتقديره لجميع المشاركين، ولكل من أسهم في تنظيم وإقامة مراسم التشييع وتغطيتها إعلامياً، كما وجّه الشكر إلى محافظتي النجف الأشرف وكربلاء المقدسة على حسن التنظيم والاستقبال. واختتم البيان بالدعاء إلى الله تعالى أن يتقبل أعمال الجميع، وأن يجزيهم خير الجزاء، وأن يحفظ العراق وأهله، ويديم وحدة صف أبنائه على طريق الحق والعدل. جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.titleKo: 미국, 이란에 대한 군사 작전 부인
articles.summaryKo: 미국 정부는 현재 이란에 대한 군사 작전을 수행하지 않고 있다고 밝혔다. 이란 내 여러 지역에서 폭발 소리가 들렸다는 보도가 있었으나, 미국 측은 이를 부인하였다.
articles.description: miliq.news واشنطن: لم ننفذ ضربات جديدة ضد ايران واشنطن: لم ننفذ ضربات جديدة ضد ايران بغداد- ميل نفى مسؤول أمريكي، تنفيذ الجيش أية ضربات حالية في إيران. ونقلت سي إن إن عن المسؤول قوله أن "الولايات المتحدة لا تنفذ حالياً أي ضربات في إيران". وأفادت وكالة مهر الإيرانية، اليوم الخميس، بسماع دوي انفجارات في بوشهر وجغادك وبندر عباس وشهابار. وذكرت الوكالة أن "انفجارات وقعت أيضًا في مدينة كنارك بمحافظة سيستان وبلوشستان جنوب شرقي إيران وبندر عباس وشهابار. وأضافت أن "6 انفجارات دوت في مدينتي بوشهر وجغادك، فيما دوت ثلاثة انفجارات في مدينة كنارك الإيرانية". جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.summaryKo: 이라크에서 아야톨라 카멘니의 추모식이 성공적으로 진행되었으며, 1천만 명이 참여하였다. 이 행사는 나즈프와 카르발라에서 조직되었고, 카멘니의 유해는 이란으로 이송되었다.
articles.description: السومرية نيوز – محليات أعلن مدير مكتب رئيس الوزراء، رئيس اللجنة العليا المكلفة بالإعداد والتنظيم لمراسم تشييع جثمان الشهيد آية الله العظمى السيد علي الحسيني الخامنئي، إحسان ياسين العوادي، اليوم الخميس، نجاح الخطة الشاملة التي أُديرت بها مراسم التشييع في النجف وكربلاء، مؤكداً مغادرة الجثمان الطاهر إلى الجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية. اللجنة العليا: نجاح مراسم تشييع الخامنئي في العراق بمشاركة 10 ملايين مشيع السومرية نيوز – محليات أعلن مدير مكتب رئيس الوزراء ، رئيس اللجنة العليا المكلفة بالإعداد والتنظيم لمراسم تشييع جثمان الشهيد آية الله العظمى السيد علي الحسيني الخامنئي، إحسان ياسين العوادي، اليوم الخميس، نجاح الخطة الشاملة التي أُديرت بها مراسم التشييع في النجف وكربلاء، مؤكداً مغادرة الجثمان الطاهر إلى الجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية. نجاح مراسم تشييع الخامنئي في العراق بمشاركة 10 ملايين مشيع قيادة العمليات المشتركة

articles.title: نجلا السيستاني يشاركان في تشييع جثمان الخامنئي في النجف الأشرف
articles.titleKo: 이라크 나주프에서 고 하메네이 장례식 참석
articles.summaryKo: 이라크 나주프에서 고 하메네이의 장례식에 시스타니의 두 아들이 참석하였다. 이들은 종교적 지도자로서의 하메네이에 대한 깊은 존경을 표명하며, 이란과의 관계를 강조하는 의미를 지닌다.
articles.description: miliq.news نجلا السيستاني يشاركان في تشييع جثمان الخامنئي في النجف الأشرف نجلا السيستاني يشاركان في تشييع جثمان الخامنئي في النجف الأشرف بغداد- ميل وصل السيد محمد رضا والسيد محمد باقر السيستاني، نجلا المرجع الديني الأعلى السيد علي الحسيني السيستاني (دام ظله)، إلى رحاب مرقد أمير المؤمنين علي بن أبي طالب (عليه السلام) للمشاركة في مراسم الصلاة على نعش السيد الشهيد علي الحسيني الخامنئي . وتجسد هذه المشاركة التقدير العميق والمكانة التي كان يحظى بها السيد الشهيد الخامنئي في الوسط الديني، وتؤكد على روح التضامن التي تجمع مراجع ورموز الحوزة العلمية في أوقات المصاب . ويأتي هذا الحضور في إطار مراسم التشييع الرسمية والشعبية التي تشهدها النجف الأشرف، قبل أن تنطلق المسيرة الجنائزية نحو مدينة كربلاء المقدسة لإتمام مراسم الدفن الأخيرة. جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.title: US crackdown on top AI fuels open-source surge - Iraqi News
articles.titleKo: 미국의 AI 시스템 제한, 오픈소스 모델에 대한 관심 증가
articles.summaryKo: 미국 정부의 인공지능 시스템 접근 제한 조치가 오픈소스 모델에 대한 관심을 높이고 있다. 특히 중국의 오픈 모델들이 주목받으며, 기존의 폐쇄형 AI 모델에 대한 의존도가 줄어들고 있다.
articles.description: The US government's shock moves to restrict access to top artificial intelligence systems from Anthropic and OpenAI have sparked growing interest in open-source models... Open models — like China’s DeepSeek — were already gaining fans because using closed AI keeps getting more expensive. New York – The US government’s shock moves to restrict access to top artificial intelligence systems from Anthropic and OpenAI have sparked growing interest in open-source models — especially ones from China. The de facto bans from an anti-regulation White House blindsided the tech world, which had grown accustomed to AI labs releasing ever more powerful models with nary a worry of government intervention. The episode has thrust a long-simmering debate to the fore: open versus closed AI. Most of the best-known AI models — like OpenAI’s ChatGPT or Anthropic’s Claude — are “closed,” meaning the company keeps the underlying code and data locked away. Users can access the AI via an app or website, mainly through a subscription, but the company controls who gets in and can shut down access at any time. “Open-source” or “open-weight” models work differently: the developers release the model’s core files for anyone to download, modify and run on their own computers. Once released, no one — not the company, not a government — can take them back. In early June, the Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block non-Americans from using its most powerful — and closed — models, Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Faced with the complexity of screening users, the startup simply pulled the models offline entirely. Shortly after, OpenAI agreed to let the government approve every customer for its newest model, GPT-5.6. “If everything you need to do has to be on a specific frontier model, that makes whatever you’re building a whole lot less reliable” when it is suddenly unavailable, said Oren Michels, co-founder and CEO of Barndoor AI. Haitham Mengad, co-founder of Stems Labs, a startup focused on AI-powered music creation, felt the disruption firsthand. “Fable has been a game-changing model for me. Honestly, when they took it off, it was the first time that I realized… it’s almost like a drug,” he recalled. The Mythos episode “was a powerful moment” for seeing open source as an alternative, Mengad said. – ‘Being flexible’ – Open models were already gaining fans because using closed AI keeps getting more expensive. Around the same time, China’s Zhipu AI (also known as Z.ai) released GLM-5.2, an open model that performed nearly as well as top offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI on several benchmarks. “GLM-5.2 is free to download, fine-tune, and run on an enterprise’s own servers, putting pricing pressure on frontier labs at the same time that access looks shaky,” AI analyst Andrew Curran noted. On OpenRouter, a platform that routes requests across different AI models, Google, Anthropic and OpenAI’s combined share of usage dropped from 55 percent to 33 percent betw
articles.cleanText: Open models — like China’s DeepSeek — were already gaining fans because using closed AI keeps getting more expensive. New York – The US government’s shock moves to restrict access to top artificial intelligence systems from Anthropic and OpenAI have sparked growing interest in open-source models — especially ones from China. The de facto bans from an anti-regulation White House blindsided the tech world, which had grown accustomed to AI labs releasing ever more powerful models with nary a worry of government intervention. The episode has thrust a long-simmering debate to the fore: open versus closed AI. Most of the best-known AI models — like OpenAI’s ChatGPT or Anthropic’s Claude — are “closed,” meaning the company keeps the underlying code and data locked away. Users can access the AI via an app or website, mainly through a subscription, but the company controls who gets in and can shut down access at any time. “Open-source” or “open-weight” models work differently: the developers release the model’s core files for anyone to download, modify and run on their own computers. Once released, no one — not the company, not a government — can take them back. In early June, the Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block non-Americans from using its most powerful — and closed — models, Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Faced with the complexity of screening users, the startup simply pulled the models offline entirely. Shortly after, OpenAI agreed to let the government approve every customer for its newest model, GPT-5.6. “If everything you need to do has to be on a specific frontier model, that makes whatever you’re building a whole lot less reliable” when it is suddenly unavailable, said Oren Michels, co-founder and CEO of Barndoor AI. Haitham Mengad, co-founder of Stems Labs, a startup focused on AI-powered music creation, felt the disruption firsthand. “Fable has been a game-changing model for me. Honestly, when they took it off, it was the first time that I realized… it’s almost like a drug,” he recalled. The Mythos episode “was a powerful moment” for seeing open source as an alternative, Mengad said. – ‘Being flexible’ – Open models were already gaining fans because using closed AI keeps getting more expensive. Around the same time, China’s Zhipu AI (also known as Z.ai) released GLM-5.2, an open model that performed nearly as well as top offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI on several benchmarks. “GLM-5.2 is free to download, fine-tune, and run on an enterprise’s own servers, putting pricing pressure on frontier labs at the same time that access looks shaky,” AI analyst Andrew Curran noted. On OpenRouter, a platform that routes requests across different AI models, Google, Anthropic and OpenAI’s combined share of usage dropped from 55 percent to 33 percent between January and June. China’s open DeepSeek now leads by a clear margin. “You want to be as flexible as you can be. Maybe a year and a half ago some large company might say we bought Anthropic or we bought OpenAI, and now no one, no one buys only one,” said Michels. Among Western companies, France’s Mistral stands largely alone in championing open models. US tech giant Meta, once a vocal open-source advocate, has stepped back from that. Meanwhile, early suspicions about Chinese AI models as a security threat are fading, at least somewhat. “I don’t think there’s any risk, to be honest,” said Mengad. The fears are more “psychological, emotional than rational.” Once you download an open model and run it on your own hardware, the company that made it — Chinese or otherwise — has no access to your data or control over how you use it. Still, some experts think the government crackdown could also end up coming for open models as they become more powerful. “If Mythos-level models are considered risky, China will also not want them to be open,” said Ethan Mollick, a professor at the University of Pennsylvania and a leading voice on AI — meaning governments everywhere, not just Washington, may want to keep top-tier AI locked down.

articles.title: كربلاء تعطل الدوام الرسمي غدا
articles.titleKo: 이라크 카르발라, 공식 근무 중단 결정
articles.summaryKo: 카르발라 주지사인 나시프 자심 알-카타비가 내일 공식 근무를 중단하기로 결정하였다. 이는 이란 최고 지도자의 장례식에 참석하기 위한 대규모 인파의 존재로 인해 지역 주민들이 서비스를 제공할 수 있도록 하기 위함이다.
articles.description: miliq.news كربلاء تعطل الدوام الرسمي غدا كربلاء تعطل الدوام الرسمي غدا بغداد- ميل قرر محافظ كربلاء المقدسة نصيف جاسم الخطابي، اليوم الأربعاء، تعطيل الدوام الرسمي في المحافظة ليوم غد الخميس . وقال الخطابي في بيان، أن "قرار تعطيل الدوام الرسمي جاء نتيجة استمرار تواجد الحشود المليونية في المحافظة للمشاركة في استقبال وتشييع الشهيد المرشد الأعلى للجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية آية الله العظمى السيد علي الخامنئي (قدس سره)، وإفساح المجال ايضا أمام أهالي كربلاء المقدسة لمواصلة تقديم الخدمات لوفود المشيعين والمشاركة في مراسم التشييع". جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)
articles.cleanText: كربلاء تعطل الدوام الرسمي غدا كربلاء تعطل الدوام الرسمي غدا بغداد- ميل قرر محافظ كربلاء المقدسة نصيف جاسم الخطابي، اليوم الأربعاء، تعطيل الدوام الرسمي في المحافظة ليوم غد الخميس . وقال الخطابي في بيان، أن "قرار تعطيل الدوام الرسمي جاء نتيجة استمرار تواجد الحشود المليونية في المحافظة للمشاركة في استقبال وتشييع الشهيد المرشد الأعلى للجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية آية الله العظمى السيد علي الخامنئي (قدس سره)، وإفساح المجال ايضا أمام أهالي كربلاء المقدسة لمواصلة تقديم الخدمات لوفود المشيعين والمشاركة في مراسم التشييع". جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)

articles.title: العراق يصدر طابعا بريديا تخليدا لذكرى تشييع السيد الخامنئي
articles.titleKo: 이라크, 카멘니 추모 우표 발행
articles.summaryKo: 이라크가 카멘니의 추모를 기념하기 위해 우표를 발행하였다. 통신부 장관이 이 우표의 발행을 발표하며, 대규모 장례식과 관련된 행사와 함께 진행되었다.
articles.description: miliq.news العراق يصدر طابعا بريديا تخليدا لذكرى تشييع السيد الخامنئي العراق يصدر طابعا بريديا تخليدا لذكرى تشييع السيد الخامنئي بغداد- ميل أطلق وزير الاتصالات مصطفى سند، اليوم الأربعاء، طابعا بريديا بمناسبة التشييع المهيب الذي شهده العراق تخليداً لاستشهاد السيد الخامنئي . وذكرت الوازرة في بيان ورد لـ"ميل"، إن "الوزير أطلق طابعا بريديا بمناسبة التشييع المهيب الذي شهده العراق تخليداً لاستشهاد السيد الخامنئي". وأوضحت، أن "الإصدار جاء بالتزامن مع التشييع المهيب الذي شهده العراق تخليداً لاستشهاد السيد الخامنئي". جميع الحقوق محفوظة (ميل نيوز)
